title: capsicum annuum var. fasciculatum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. fasciculatum, also known as the cluster pepper or Thai chile, is a variety of the Capsicum annuum plant, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Capsicum annuum var. fasciculatum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, and can be used to treat a range of ailments.
